steps.title: Use the example relationship
steps.content: The sentence first says many writers in other literary forms are still well known. The next independent clause gives Koulsy Lamko as an example of that general claim.

steps.title: Pick the right separator
steps.content: Choice A creates a run-on. Choice C uses a conjunction where an example relationship is needed. Choice D creates a comma splice. The remaining punctuation correctly introduces the example after a complete clause. The answer is B.
